standard.$description: Default curve — balanced acceleration / deceleration. Use for in-and-out transitions and most state changes (spec §5.1).

emphasised.$description: Emphasised — biased toward the end. Use for moments that should land with intent (gauge fill, story reveals, hero CTAs).

decelerated.$description: Pure deceleration — fast in, ease to rest. Use for entries: things appearing on screen (modals, drawers, citation chips mounting).
